title: Show Your Shelves - Better Shelves
description: This pack makes all types of shelves more "shelvy" — true display shelves!
body:
# Show Your Shelves

**Didn’t it feel like the new shelves in Minecraft weren’t really all that… “shelvy”?**

![Official Shelf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a45f2722cd0554489096f8d5fc337a1b38a60e30.jpeg)

**Well, this pack fixes that!**

With **Show Your Shelves**, every type of shelf has been redesigned to look and feel like proper display shelves, just the way they should be. **No more items floating awkwardly in the air** like in the official Minecraft version — now they sit naturally on realistic, functional-looking shelves.

![Wallpaper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ca055fe79dc81c646fe6b1660d7814bf74afc90.png)

Of course, all the base shelf functionality is still intact — including the instant hotbar swap — so you won’t lose any of the original mechanics.

All shelf variants are included in this format, so wherever you place them, they’ll finally live up to the name.

**I hope you enjoy this texture pack and that it makes your world a little more “shelvy.”
Thanks for checking it out!**

-Lordd727
